title: Azure Imperium

The '''Azure Imperium''' was a government that predated the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] by [[Standard century/Legends|centuries]] and centered on the twin worlds of [[Axum]] and [[Anaxes/Legends|Anaxes]] in the [[Axum system]],<ref name="Core Worlds" /> which were populated by [[Human/Legends|Humans]] who had arrived on [[Sleeper ship/Legends|sleeper ships]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="Atlas">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> While Anaxes served as the Imperium's primary [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyard]] and [[Fortress/Legends|fortress]] world, the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] Axum was the Imperium's [[Capital/Legends|capital]], and the Imperium's territory was spread along the [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] that was later known as the [[Perlemian Trade Route/Legends|Perlemian Trade Route]]. The Imperium was peacefully absorbed by the growing influence of Coruscant several centuries<ref name="Core Worlds" /> before the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[25,053 BBY]], when the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] was founded,<ref name="Atlas" /> though the Imperium's influence could still be felt in the millennia afterwards—the [[Azure sector/Legends|Azure sector]] and the [[Republic Military/Legends|Republic Military's]] [[First Army|Azure Hammer Command]] took their names from the Azure Imperium.<ref name="Core Worlds" /> During the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]] between the Republic and the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Sith Empire]], an [[Azure Imperium ruin]] was discovered and excavated on Anaxes.<ref name="Riches" />
